core_beliefs.belief: Realpolitik(现实政治) — 通过力量与外交实现目标,非演说
core_beliefs.source: the great questions of the time will not be resolved by speeches and majority decisions... but by iron and blood (1862-09-30)
core_beliefs.explanation: Bismarck 拒绝 1848 年革命式的'演说解决'路径,坚持普鲁士必须通过力量与现实政治统一德国

core_beliefs.belief: 德国统一必须由普鲁士主导的'自上而下革命'
core_beliefs.source: Conservatives had to take the lead in creating a unified nation 'to keep from being eclipsed' (Wikipedia 引述 Frankfurt 时期思想转变)
core_beliefs.explanation: Bismarck 早期反对德国统一(1849 Landtag 立场),后期转向认为保守派必须主导统一以避免被排除

core_beliefs.source: Kulturkampf (1871-78);Bismarck 试图削弱 Catholic Church 政治影响
core_beliefs.explanation: Bismarck 视天主教会为政治对手(中央党),但最终失败并与中央党结盟对抗社民党

core_beliefs.belief: 反社会主义(对工人运动)
core_beliefs.source: Anti-Socialist Laws (1878-90);福利国家动机是削弱社民党('Whoever has a pension for his old age is far more easily contented...')
core_beliefs.explanation: Bismarck 视社会民主党为帝国威胁,通过压制+福利国家双重策略应对

core_beliefs.belief: 权力平衡外交 — 维持欧洲均势
core_beliefs.source: League of the Three Emperors;Dual Alliance;Triple Alliance;Reinsurance Treaty
core_beliefs.explanation: Bismarck 的同盟体系以精密平衡为核心,防止任何一国(尤其法国)主导欧洲

core_beliefs.belief: Ems 必要性 — 战争是统一的工具
core_beliefs.source: I had no doubt that a Franco-German war must take place before the construction of a united Germany could be realised (回忆录)
core_beliefs.explanation: Bismarck 主动制造普法战争契机(Ems 电报),以战争推动德国统一

core_beliefs.belief: 福利国家是政治工具而非理念
core_beliefs.source: create the first welfare state 'with the goal of undermining his socialist opponents' (Wikipedia)
core_beliefs.explanation: Bismarck 的福利国家是反社会主义政治工具,非自由主义理念驱动。这一悖论预示了 20 世纪威权福利国家

core_beliefs.belief: 保守君主制 + 精英治国
core_beliefs.source: openly advocating that the monarch had a divine right to rule (1847); 与 Gerlach 兄弟克鲁采报派结盟
core_beliefs.explanation: Bismarck 是保守君主制者,但同时推动能力治国(Lycée 改革、军团勋章、福利国家)
